The '''''Tantive I''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
When [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs Darklighter's]] [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] broke down while carrying the recently intercepted schematics for the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]], the ''Tantive I'', along with the ''[[Tantive II]]'' and the [[Tantive III (Rebel Alliance)|''Tantive III'']], was sent to [[Rescue of Biggs Darklighter|escort]] [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttles]] which would restore the X-wing's power generator.

It arrived from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] to find Rebel [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter|R-22 Spearheads]] fighting [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] which were attacking the X-wing. After helping finish off the Gunboats, the ''Tantive I'' waited until the X-wing was repaired and followed it into hyperspace.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]
